public_categories: Release decisions, deprecation decisions, version bumps
Public commitments to roadmap, dates, or calendar items
Reflective patterns recorded at least 30 days after the underlying tactical decisions
private_categories: Specific individuals being considered for outreach
Specific organizations being evaluated for partnership or recruitment
Confidence levels regarding third-party responses or behavior
Pre-execution tactical details where publicity could materially affect outcomes
Operational priorities not yet publicly committed
migration_rule: Entries recorded privately may be migrated to public when at least one of the following holds: (a) sufficient time has passed that operational sensitivity has expired, (b) third parties referenced have engaged voluntarily and consent to disclosure, or (c) the matter has become public through independent means. The Steward decides case by case.
